parameters.query:
-- Dentistas
SELECT 'dentista' as record_type, d.id, d.nome, d.cro, d.especialidade as detail1, array_to_string(d.especialidades, ', ') as detail2, NULL as detail3, NULL::decimal as price
FROM {{ $("Trigger").first().json.schema_name || "public" }}.dentistas d
WHERE d.ativo = true
  AND ($1::text = 'dentistas')
  AND (NULLIF(TRIM($2::text), '') IS NULL OR d.especialidade ILIKE '%' || $2::text || '%' OR $2::text = ANY(d.especialidades))

UNION ALL

-- Procedimentos
SELECT 'procedimento' as record_type, p.id, p.nome, p.codigo as cro, p.categoria as detail1, p.descricao as detail2, p.duracao_media_min || ' min' as detail3, p.preco_base as price
FROM {{ $("Trigger").first().json.schema_name || "public" }}.procedimentos p
WHERE p.ativo = true
  AND ($1::text = 'procedimentos')
  AND (NULLIF(TRIM($3::text), '') IS NULL OR p.categoria ILIKE '%' || $3::text || '%')

ORDER BY record_type, nome
LIMIT 30;
